title: Lianna (disambiguation)
content:
'''Lianna''' was a female first name shared by:

*[[Lianna Tagon]], an employee of [[Daran Tal]]
*[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], who once went by the alias Lianna

'''Lianna''' was the name of several locations:

*[[Lianna City]], the capital city of...
*[[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]], a planet orbiting...
*[[Lianna (star)]], the central celestial body of the...
*[[Lianna system/Legends|Lianna system]]

'''Lianna''' was also a class of corvette:

*[[Lianna-class corvette|''Lianna''-class corvette]], used by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
